item.name: Mobile API (Sanctum)
item.description: Mobile endpoints under /api using Sanctum Bearer tokens. Realtime channels: private-user.{id}, private-volunteer.{id}, private-volunteers.live

item.name: Admin API (Session Cookie)
item.description: Admin endpoints use web session (cookies). In Postman: call /admin/login first, then cookies will be used automatically for protected routes.
